name: Mermaid Quadrant Chart — Research Method Selection
input: Create a quadrant chart for selecting research methods based on cost and sample size.
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: 2x2 quadrant chart with labeled axes and positioned data points.

data.syntax:
quadrantChart
    title Research Method Selection
    x-axis Low Cost --> High Cost
    y-axis Small Sample --> Large Sample
    quadrant-1 Population Studies
    quadrant-2 Large-Scale Trials
    quadrant-3 Exploratory Research
    quadrant-4 Precision Studies
    Surveys: [0.2, 0.8]
    Questionnaires: [0.3, 0.7]
    RCTs: [0.8, 0.9]
    Cohort Studies: [0.7, 0.8]
    Case Studies: [0.2, 0.2]
    Literature Reviews: [0.1, 0.3]
    Lab Experiments: [0.8, 0.3]
    Genetic Studies: [0.9, 0.2]
data.caption: Research method selection based on cost and sample size requirements
